nodes.notes: UNVALIDATED: No live WordPress site was available to test this node end-to-end. Node configuration follows n8n's documented WordPress node schema (resource: post, operation: create) and the WordPress REST API's expected fields (title, content, excerpt, status). Requires WordPress Application Password credentials configured in n8n before use. Verify against a real site before relying on this in production.
